title: Dynamic Caption Effect Plugin Manifest (api 1)
description: Validates the static, JSON-serializable fields of a plugin's default export. NOTE: a manifest is a live JS module, so the `apply` FUNCTION on each effect cannot be checked by JSON Schema — it is validated at runtime by the host (must be a function) and by the plugin validator (must be pure/deterministic/in-range). Use this schema to lint the static metadata only.

textEffects.description: Text effects contributed by this plugin.

lineTransitions.description: Whole-line docking transitions (unit: 'line') contributed by this plugin.

videoTransitions.description: Video transitions (enter/leave) contributed by this plugin.

in.description: REQUIRED function (p, m) => PartialVideoFx, p: 0→1. Validated at runtime.

out.description: REQUIRED function (p, m) => PartialVideoFx, p: 1→0. Validated at runtime.

maxDepth.description: Docked older lines to keep (host clamps 0..6).

enterFrom.description: REQUIRED function (args, m) => PartialLineFx. Validated at runtime.

pose.description: REQUIRED function (depth, args, m) => PartialLineFx. Validated at runtime.

id.description: Globally unique id; namespace it, e.g. alice.wave.

name.description: Display name in the effect picker.

unit.description: Animation unit: per character or per word.

appearAtLineStart.description: If true, all chars appear at line start together (karaoke-style).

reveal.description: Declarative geometric clip-mask reveal during the enter window. Pair with appearAtLineStart: true.

wordBox.description: Draw a rounded highlight box behind the current word that springs word-to-word.

apply.description: REQUIRED function (args, m) => PartialCharFx. Cannot be expressed in JSON; validated at runtime.
